tieBreakingRule.text: In the event that two (or more) teams finish with an equal number of points, the following rules break the tie: Regular season: 1. Head-to-head games between the teams concerned 1a. Points total 1b. Goal difference 2. Goal difference 3. Goals scored 4. Goals received Championship and Relegation Round: 1. Head-to-head games between the teams concerned 1a. Points total 1b. Goal difference 2. Higher rank during regular season of the championship

In the event that two (or more) teams finish with an equal number of points, the following rules break the tie:

Championship and Relegation Round: 1. Head-to-head games between the teams concerned 1a. Points total 1b. Goal difference 2. Higher rank during regular season of the championship
